title: Change how API returns and accepts addressses
excerpt: When updating an address field in Monday you are required to have the full address, latitude and longitude. When pulling an address field in Monday it only returns the address. This means if I want to copy one address to…

posts.author: Meneghini (Meneghini)
posts.cookedHtml:
When updating an address field in Monday you are required to have the full address, latitude and longitude. When pulling an address field in Monday it only returns the address. This means if I want to copy one address to another record, I will need to pull the address, use another software to get the latitude and longitude then update the new field.

Can we have the API return the address, latitude and longitude?

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Meneghini,

I came accross your post and I know it’s been from a while ago but in the meantime it is possible using the latest version of the API (2023-10). For each column type you can request specific fields to be returned and for the location field you can return the latitude & longitude as well.

You can read more about it here.

Best,

Maarten

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: You always could get the latitude and longitude from the values field of the location column. many people only the text field which is just the address.
